creator: frederic.ardisson@gmail.com
text:
Good morning everyone,


I want to know how I can compil heimdal-1.5.2 with openldap backend -
openldap24-server) without this error message  "kadmin: error trying to
load dynamic module /usr/lib/hdb_ldap.so: Cannot open
"/usr/lib/hdb_ldap.so" in FreeBSD 8.3,8.2 & 9.0

*Here are the steps*:

1) *Ports* :

Compilation of usr/ports/net/openldap24-server
Compilation of /usr/ports/security/heimdal (
--with-openldap=/usr/local/etc/openldap)
Results= KO

2) *Paquets*:

Compilation of openldap2.3 & DB berkeley
Compilation of  heimdal 1.5 (  --with-openldap=/usr/local/etc/openldap)
Results = KO

You have an idea for this problem ( solved with this url
http://forums.freebsd.org/showthread.php?t=27214)

I tried everything for i can't fix the probelm.

Thanks

-- 
Cordialement,

Frédèric ARDISSON
